case_title: MARC LUMER &. COMPANY VS. ELINE ENTERTAINTMENT GROUP, INC., A SUSPENDED et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARC LUMER &. COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELINE ENTERTAINTMENT GROUP, INC., A SUSPENDED NEVADA CORPORATION, F.K.A. ELINE MUSIC COM, INC.,  F.K.A. RAPID RETRIEVAL SYSTEMS, INC., $14,953.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $5,342.30 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,255.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MARC LUMER &. COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLAINT; ADR PKG (RETURN RECEIPT ATTACHED THERETO), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARC LUMER &. BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
